product_overview: TukiFact is a multi-tenant SaaS platform for electronic invoicing in Peru that lets businesses register, emit, manage and download electronic documents (Facturas, Boletas, notas) while viewing KPIs and managing company settings.
core_goals: Onboard a company tenant and an admin user so they can start emitting electronic documents
Authenticate users per-tenant and provide role-based access to dashboard and document workflows
Emit electronic documents (Facturas, Boletas, Credit/Debit notes) with proper series, correlative numbers and tax calculations
Browse, filter and inspect historical documents and download PDF/XML outputs
Manage document series and company settings including uploading a digital certificate for signing

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new tenant and an initial admin user so a company can start using the platform.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill RUC, razon social, direccion, admin full name, admin email and admin password -> Submit registration form -> See redirect to /dashboard and receive initial session
Navigate to /register -> Fill RUC with invalid format (not 11 digits or wrong prefix) -> Fill remaining fields -> Submit registration form -> See validation error describing RUC format

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate an existing tenant user with tenant ID, email and password to access protected areas.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill tenant ID -> Fill email -> Fill password -> Submit login form -> See redirect to /dashboard on success
Navigate to /login -> Fill tenant ID -> Fill email -> Fill wrong password -> Submit login form -> See authentication error about invalid credentials

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Surface high-level KPIs and charts summarizing invoicing activity for the current tenant.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See KPI cards for today, month and year summaries -> See monthly sales bar chart -> See documents-by-status pie chart

features.name: Documents List
features.description: Browse tenant documents with pagination and filters to locate specific invoices or receipts.
user_flows: Navigate to /documents -> Filter by document type -> Filter by status -> Navigate pages using pagination controls -> Select a row to view document detail -> See table of documents and pagination metadata
Navigate to /documents -> Set dateFrom later than dateTo -> Apply filters -> See validation error about date range

features.name: View Document Detail
features.description: Inspect a single document's full details, status and download available outputs (PDF and XML).
user_flows: Navigate to /documents -> Select a row to view document detail -> See document metadata, items, totals and status with appropriate indicator -> Download PDF -> Download XML

features.name: Emit Document
features.description: Create and emit new electronic documents (Factura or Boleta) with customer data, items and selected series.
user_flows: Navigate to /documents/new -> Select document type -> Select series -> Fill customer data (RUC/DNI as applicable) -> Add one or more items with quantity and unit price -> Submit document -> See redirect to document detail and status accepted with hash present
Navigate to /documents/new -> Select document type -> Select series -> Fill customer data -> Do not add items -> Submit document -> See validation error indicating items are required

features.name: Series Management
features.description: List and create document series (e.g., F001, B001) so users can emit documents with correct series and correlative numbers.
user_flows: Navigate to /series -> View series table with existing series and current correlative -> Start new series creation -> Fill serie code and related fields -> Submit series form -> See newly created series listed with current correlative
Navigate to /series -> Start new series creation -> Fill serie code with wrong length or invalid prefix -> Submit series form -> See validation error about serie format/length

features.name: Company Settings & Certificate Upload
features.description: View and update company information and upload a digital certificate so documents can be signed automatically.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> View company information including ruc, razonSocial, plan and hasCertificate -> Update editable fields (nombreComercial, direccion, departamento, provincia, distrito, primaryColor) -> Submit changes -> See updated company information
Navigate to /settings -> Upload certificate file (pem/pfx/p12) and provide password if required -> Submit certificate upload -> See certificate configured with subject and expiry displayed
Navigate to /settings -> Upload certificate file larger than 5MB or in unsupported format -> Submit certificate upload -> See validation error about file size or format

features.name: Sidebar Navigation & Logout
features.description: Navigate between authenticated pages and end the session using the user controls.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Use sidebar navigation to move to /documents -> Use sidebar navigation to move to /series -> Open user controls -> Log out -> See redirect to /login

routes.description: Login with tenant ID, email, password

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with tenant ID, email, password
